title: Retention Hooks V2
description: Hook-first transitions, intro punch-ins, and rhythm presets designed for higher short-form retention.
shortPitch: Built for creators who need stronger first-3-second performance.

faq.a: Yes. Presets are organized for quick drag-and-drop and include setup guidance.

faq.q: Does this work for vertical videos?
faq.a: Yes. The pack is optimized for short-form workflows and vertical compositions.

title: Longform Storyflow Pack
description: Chapter pacing and connective tissue presets to keep long videos smooth and engaging.
shortPitch: Create cleaner chapter transitions and improved watch-time consistency.

faq.q: Is this only for documentary style?
faq.a: No. It is designed for most creator longform categories including commentary and tutorials.

faq.q: Can I combine this with other packs?
faq.a: Yes. Naming and organization are built to coexist with other presets.

title: Caption Surge Toolkit
description: Readable kinetic captions for talking-head, tutorial, and reaction formats.
shortPitch: Boost readability and emphasis without cluttering the frame.

faq.a: The toolkit uses common editable font stacks and includes fallback recommendations.

faq.q: Can I use this for short and long videos?
faq.a: Yes. Styles are tuned for both vertical and widescreen edits.
